scope: User-observed and diagnostic-validated PQ35 comfort/infotainment CAN seeds for passive Open MMI research
safety: Passive data only. Do not transmit, spoof or replay these frames from Open MMI runtime.

2026-07-01_validation_capture.passive_trace: Open MMI tablet comfort/infotainment CAN candump at 100000 bit/s
2026-07-01_validation_capture.notes: Dimmer, blower and speed were validated from a deliberate state-change capture on the 100 kbit/s comfort/infotainment bus. Keep raw captures private.

signals.name: dimmer_470_b2
signals.notes: Preferred timing anchor for paired diagnostic CSV + passive candump captures.

signals.name: blower_3e1_b4
signals.notes: HVAC blower/turbine load broadcast candidate promoted to confirmed for this PQ35 profile.

signals.name: speed_351_u16le_b1_200
signals.validation: corr +0.995, raw 0..9450, speed range 0..47 km/h, rmse 1.31
signals.notes: Byte 0 also carries reverse-state observations. Prefer the full u16le speed over the deprecated byte[1] low-speed artefact.

signals.name: speed_527_u16le_b1_200
signals.validation: corr +0.996, raw 1..9450, speed range 0..47 km/h, rmse 1.3
signals.notes: Duplicate or related speed broadcast; ranked fractionally above 0x351 in validation.

signals.name: speed_359_u16le_b1_200
signals.validation: corr +0.995, raw 1..9430, speed range 0..47 km/h, rmse 1.33
signals.notes: Duplicate or related speed broadcast. Map frame roles before choosing the Open MMI runtime source.

signals.name: speed_351_b1_candidate
signals.notes: Looked plausible over 0..4 km/h but was superseded by u16le(bytes[1:3]) / 200 over 0..47 km/h.

signals.name: illumination_635_b0_candidate
signals.notes: Validation capture showed corr +0.999 against dimmer, raw 30..100. Earlier note treated 0x64 as lights on; this may be illumination level rather than boolean.

signals.name: steering_angle_3c3_b0_b1
signals.formula: counts * 0.04375; byte1 bit7 appears to encode direction
signals.notes: Needs formal validation before use. Bytes 5 and 7 likely counter/checksum.

bus.name: comfort
bus.description: PQ35 comfort/infotainment CAN used by the Open MMI tablet
bus.notes: The passive Open MMI/tablet capture is on the 100 kbit/s comfort/infotainment bus. Active diagnostic truth captures remain on the 500 kbit/s TP2.0/KWP diagnostic CAN.
